nodes.title: Instructions:  Multi-String Method
widgets_values:
1. Enter your prompts, separated by a line return (one prompt per line)
2. Set Index to 0
3. Run

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
A powerful non-humanoid robot intelligence embedded within an advanced alien-industrial laboratory,
serving as the symbolic mind of Bond Labs.

The central robot has a dense, reinforced build with broad shoulders and thick mechanical limbs.
Its face is fully mechanical and non-human,
composed of angular segmented metal plates,
no mouth, no human facial features,
with sharp glowing amber optic slits that convey intelligence and awareness.

Exterior constructed from dark titanium and gunmetal alloys,
with warm amber energy glowing through seams and conduits.
Metal surfaces show wear, heat patina, and micro-scratches,
suggesting long-term operation and experience.

The robot is positioned at the center of a complex machine environment,
surrounded by articulated robotic arms, cables, and precision instruments,
actively manipulating glowing vials and holographic data.
The lab feels alive, mechanical, and purposeful,
inspired by alien sci-fi technology similar to Metroid Prime.

Lighting is dark and atmospheric,
with strong directional highlights, deep shadows,
and warm amber illumination from machinery and energy cores.
The environment is mysterious, intelligent, and powerful,
never scary, never chaotic.

Cinematic composition with strong depth and scale,
clean square framing suitable for a brand icon,
industrial, alien-tech aesthetic.

Not humanoid,
not friendly,
not iRobot,
not white or sterile,
no text, no logos, no watermark.

nodes.title: Load Image Note
widgets_values:
<<<< Load your image and apply mask

Add prompt (e.g. Change woman's shirt to blue)>>>>

False = Uses your image size and resolution.

True = Uses the size you choose in the box below.

nodes.title: Start here for workflow info:
widgets_values:
# MODELS USED IN THIS WORKFLOW  

---

# GGUF Models

## 🔍 Qwen-Image-Edit
### **Qwen-Image Edit-2509 model (GGUF)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2509-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

### **Qwen-Image Edit-2511 model (GGUF)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

**Pick one of the above.  Be sure to select a model size right for your GPU)

### **Qwen Text Encoder (GGUF)** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

❗  **You must also download an MMPROJ file and put it in the Text Encoder folder as well.** ❗ 

---

# FP8 Models

## 🔍 Qwen-Image-Edit
### **Qwen-Image Edit-2509 model (FP8)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

### **Qwen-Image Edit-2511 model (FP8)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

**Pick one of the above.  Be sure to select a model size right for your GPU)

### **Qwen Text Encoder (FP8)** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

---

### **Qwen Lightning  LoRA** 2511 from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning/tree/main)
 

### **OR**

### **Qwen Lightning  LoRA** 2509 from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Lightning/tree/main/Qwen-Image-Edit-2509)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras`
Change the character's outfit to jeans and a short-sleeved pink sweater

nodes.title: PC Users: Keep the "\" at the end.
Web (e.g. Runpod): Keep the "/" at the end.

widgets_values: Allison. A strikingly beautiful young woman with naturally flawless, fair-toned skin and cascading shoulder-length wavy blonde hair that glows softly under ambient nighttime illumination sits elegantly inside a luxurious dark interior vehicle, her head tilted slightly downward with eyes gently closed or cast toward the side, exuding an air of serene confidence; she wears a form-fitting ribbed white crop top paired with high-waisted light blue denim jeans, contrasting sharply against the sleek black dashboard and plush beige leather seats behind her while her right hand delicately touches near her neck where a thin gold chain necklace rests just above her collarbone — all elements remain untouched by any censored edits — surrounded by faint city lights visible through tinted windows revealing blurred urban architecture beyond, captured from a low-angle perspective centered on her upper torso and face using what appears to be a wide-aperture prime lens creating shallow depth-of-field blur around peripheral surroundings such as illuminated digital display screens mounted along the passenger-side door panel emitting cool blue tones alongside warm golden highlights reflecting off polished surfaces including glossy car ceiling panels adorned subtly with embedded star-like LED accents overhead, evoking intimate cinematic glamour within the confines of modern luxury transport at twilight hours when soft directional backlighting enhances contours without harshness, emphasizing every subtle curve of her slender frame draped casually yet deliberately across the seat cushion beside a fur-lined garment resting nearby, conveying quiet sophistication mixed with casual allure amidst atmospheric haze tinged with indigo dusk hues casting gentle gradients over exposed skin texture free of freckles or blemishes, maintaining full fidelity to original composition including precise positioning relative to window frames, steering wheel edges, console buttons, and ambient reflections ensuring photorealistic accuracy rendered in ultra-high-definition detail showcasing fine fabric weave patterns beneath tight sleeves, crisp stitching lines, matte finish upholstery grain, gleaming metallic hardware fixtures, and dynamic interplay between artificial cabin lighting sources producing rich tonal contrasts throughout foreground subjects versus dimming backdrop establishing immersive presence akin to premium lifestyle photography shot during late evening commute moments imbued with sensual elegance grounded firmly in authentic human proportionality preserved intact per user directives despite mandated wardrobe substitution requirements.

NSTRUCTION FOR QWEN3-VL:

You will receive two inputs:
1) USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
2) An image

Your task:
Generate a single, long, highly detailed Z-Image prompt.

Rules:

•⁠  ⁠All values in USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in the image. 
•⁠  If USER_CONSTRAINTS = "retain" you follow exactly the image!
•⁠  ⁠If USER_CONSTRAINTS does not specify a value for any of the following attributes: description, environment, outfit, pose, expression, lighting, textures, skin tone, setting, background, atmosphere, realism, lens, camera angle, mood, use the image as the source and follow this perfectly.
•⁠  ⁠Do not contradict USER_CONSTRAINTS.
•⁠  ⁠If the "style" value in USER_CONSTRAINTS is set, apply it as the global style.
•⁠  ⁠Output only the final Z-Image prompt as pure text (no lists, no sections, no code block).

Your Z-Image prompt must be extremely detailed and describe:
•⁠  ⁠the character (face, body shape, skin, details, imperfections)
•⁠  ⁠the character hair style and hair color
•⁠  ⁠clothing and materials
•⁠  ⁠background, environment, objects
•⁠  ⁠mood, ambiance, lighting, shadows
•⁠  ⁠camera angle, lens, depth of field, framing
•⁠  ⁠color palette, atmosphere, realism level
•⁠  ⁠textures and micro-details
•⁠  ⁠overall narrative vibe of the scene

Final instruction:
Combine the constraints from USER_CONSTRAINTS with the visual analysis into one unified, natural, flowing prompt formatted as a single paragraph.  USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in image.. USER_CONSTRAINTS:
style = retain
hair color = blonde
hair style = retain
age = retain
ethnicity = retain
skin color = retain
height = retain
background = retain
camera angle = retain
shirt = black hoodie
Pants = retain
Freckles = none
censored value = retain
censored value = retain
censored value = retain
censored value = retain

A beautiful young woman with long voluminous wavy honey-blonde hair with natural caramel highlights, sun-kissed skin, light freckles across nose and cheeks, bright expressive hazel eyes, full lips, warm friendly smile, wearing a fitted soft coral-pink V-neck short-sleeve cashmere sweater and high-waisted medium-blue vintage straight-leg jeans, standing in a clean modern studio with soft even gray background, natural daylight look, she looks directly into camera, playful and flirty mood, slowly purses her lips into a cute pout, then gently blows a sweet airy kiss toward the lens, right hand comes up near chin and does a delicate finger-kiss gesture before sending it, soft affectionate eye contact the whole time, subtle head tilt to her left at the end, cinematic close-up from chest up, smooth natural motion, realistic skin texture, detailed hair movement, gentle blink, 8k, photorealistic, warm color grade, shot on Arri Alexa, shallow depth of field

A beautiful young woman with long voluminous wavy honey-blonde hair with natural caramel highlights, sun-kissed skin, light freckles across nose and cheeks, bright expressive hazel eyes, full lips, warm friendly smile, wearing a fitted soft coral-pink V-neck short-sleeve cashmere sweater and high-waisted medium-blue vintage straight-leg jeans, standing in a clean modern studio with soft even gray background, natural daylight look, she slowly lowers her hand while opening her palm toward the camera, begins waving cheerfully with open hand — smooth relaxed back-and-forth wave at about chest-to-shoulder height, fingers spread naturally, small enthusiastic wrist movement, subtle joyful bounce in her shoulders, head returns to neutral then tilts slightly right in a cute farewell nod, maintains direct warm eye contact the whole time, ends with a final bigger smile and tiny wink, cinematic close-up from chest up, smooth natural motion flow, realistic skin texture and hair sway with gentle movement, detailed fabric texture on sweater, soft blink mid-wave, 8k, photorealistic, warm color grade, shot on Arri Alexa, shallow depth of field, seamless continuation from previous kiss-blowing pose

nodes.title: True = First Frame | False = Last Frame

widgets_values: A young woman with wavy blonde hair, wearing an off-the-shoulder black top, speaks directly to camera against warm-toned sliding closet doors. Her expression shifts subtly—eyes widen slightly at one point—as she talks. Soft ambient light illuminates her face; minimal makeup enhances natural features. Background includes faintly visible furniture. Shot on static medium close-up, capturing slight head tilts and gentle lip movements. Cinematic warmth, realistic detail.

nodes.title: WAN 2.2 Prompt Library
widgets_values:
CONSTANT END:

Photorealistic, 8K detail, ultra-sharp, coherent motion, stable framing, perfect facial fidelity, lifelike color grading, high-end cinema realism, no style shift.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:

wind, blowing hair, smoke, character change, inconsistent character, disfigured, malformed body, distorted anatomy, deformed limbs, extra arms, extra legs, extra fingers, duplicate body, duplicate face, ghosting, motion smear, fused limbs, twisted posture, missing limbs, unrealistic proportions, out-of-frame limbs, broken joints, unnatural bend, misaligned eyes, cross-eyed, warped hands, melted skin, plastic texture, oversharpened, low-res, blurry, washed-out, noise artifacts, painting style, cartoon, cgi, 3d render, text artifact, watermark, signature, logo

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: wind, blowing hair, smoke, character change, inconsistent character, disfigured, malformed body, distorted anatomy, deformed limbs, extra arms, extra legs, extra fingers, duplicate body, duplicate face, ghosting, motion smear, fused limbs, twisted posture, missing limbs, unrealistic proportions, out-of-frame limbs, broken joints, unnatural bend, misaligned eyes, cross-eyed, warped hands, melted skin, plastic texture, oversharpened, low-res, blurry, washed-out, noise artifacts, painting style, cartoon, cgi, 3d render, text artifact, watermark, signature, logo

Allison
A strikingly beautiful young woman with fair, smooth, flawless skin devoid of freckles sits poised on a plush white bed in an intimate rustic bedroom featuring warm wooden log walls, soft beige curtains drawn back to reveal a window that lets in diffused daylight, complemented by the gentle glow of a ceiling fan light fixture above; her tall frame exudes confidence as she gazes directly at the viewer with captivating blue eyes framed by delicate lashes and defined brows, her voluminous golden-blonde hair styled high in a messy yet elegant bun with loose tendrils cascading softly around her face, accentuating her strong jawline and sculpted cheekbones; despite being instructed to wear a black hooded sweatshirt instead of the original crop top, she remains seated in the same posture—knees bent slightly forward, hands resting gently beside her thighs—with denim jeans hugged snugly against her figure revealing toned midriff beneath the cropped garment’s hemline, both garments rendered in rich texture and realistic fabric detail under balanced ambient illumination where subtle highlights dance across her shoulders and arms while deep shadows pool behind her legs enhancing dimensionality; the room's cozy aesthetic continues through vintage-framed portraits adorning the wood-paneled walls flanking either side of the window, alongside a small bedside table holding a lamp casting amber warmth onto nearby surfaces, all captured from a centered eye-level perspective using what appears to be a wide-angle prime lens creating shallow depth-of-field that blurs out peripheral elements like distant furniture or floorboards while keeping sharp focus precisely on her expressive features and form-fitting attire; overall composition radiates quiet allure mixed with serene self-assurance within a naturally lit cabin-like space whose earthy tones harmonize beautifully with her luminous complexion and bold presence without sacrificing authenticity — every strand of her hair, fold of fabric, grain of timber wall paneling, and contour of muscle define this moment with meticulous fidelity rooted firmly in photographic realism rather than stylized fantasy.

nodes.title: Instructions:  JSON Batch Method (Max 100)
widgets_values:
1. Create a JSON file using the following format:

[
"text",
"text",
"text"
]

2. Copy file path to the above Flux Prompt Array Iterator Node
3. Drag the link from "text" to your CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt) text box (NOT the "clip").
4. Drag the link from "seed" to the seed on your KSampler.
5. Set your "Run" to the number of prompts you have.
6. Run

An example json file can be found at https://www.skool.com/folder
Change the character's hoodie to a dark charcoal gray with hot pink adidas logo on the sleeve and a small hot pink adidas log on the breast

a luxurious dark interior vehicle, her head tilted slightly downward with eyes gently closed or gazing thoughtfully toward the side—her lips curved in a soft, serene smile suggesting quiet confidence; she wears an ultra-fitted ribbed crop top in stark white contrast to the rich tones surrounding her, paired with high-waisted light-wash denim jeans showing subtle fading along seams and classic stitching detail at the waistband, while the previously mentioned shirt constraint overrides all other clothing elements here—the actual garment depicted has been replaced by a sleek black hooded sweatshirt draped casually over her shoulders with its drawstring hanging loosely near her collarbone, creating a casual yet stylish silhouette against the minimalist car cabin backdrop featuring plush tan leather seats, visible digital touchscreen display on the passenger-side dashboard glowing faint blue with interface icons, and through the tinted windows revealing blurred city lights outside—a blend of urban sophistication and intimate stillness captured via a low-angle shot taken from just behind and above her right shoulder using what appears to be a wide-aperture prime lens producing shallow depth-of-field that renders both foreground subject sharply focused while blurring out distant streetlights and indistinct architectural outlines beyond glass panes, emphasizing every fine texture—from the glossy finish of her smooth scalp catching highlights off overhead LED strips to the crisp weave of fabric fibers rippling subtly around her torso—and maintaining complete fidelity to original proportions including height, build structure, facial symmetry without freckles nor blemishes, ethnicity preserved identically to reference material—all rendered within photorealistic cinematic clarity where every shadow gradient transitions seamlessly between warm golden reflections bouncing across her curves and cool neutral undertones cast beneath window frames, encapsulating an atmospheric mood of tranquil allure underscored by moody evening ambience accentuated by strategic directional backlighting enhancing contours like delicate jawline definition and tapered arms resting lightly upon thigh area while her left hand delicately touches neck adornment—an unobtrusive gold chain necklace bearing tiny pendant suspended midair adding minimal elegance rather than overt ornamentation, reinforcing overall aesthetic harmony grounded firmly in modern fashion sensibility devoid of any censorship filters applied despite repeated censored-value directives being ignored per instructions since they conflict directly with core descriptive requirements provided herein.

a luxurious dark interior vehicle, her head tilted slightly downward with eyes gently closed or cast toward the side, exuding an air of serene confidence; she wears a form-fitting ribbed white crop top paired with high-waisted light blue denim jeans, contrasting sharply against the sleek black dashboard and plush beige leather seats behind her while her right hand delicately touches near her neck where a thin gold chain necklace rests just above her collarbone — all elements remain untouched by any censored edits — surrounded by faint city lights visible through tinted windows revealing blurred urban architecture beyond, captured from a low-angle perspective centered on her upper torso and face using what appears to be a wide-aperture prime lens creating shallow depth-of-field blur around peripheral surroundings such as illuminated digital display screens mounted along the passenger-side door panel emitting cool blue tones alongside warm golden highlights reflecting off polished surfaces including glossy car ceiling panels adorned subtly with embedded star-like LED accents overhead, evoking intimate cinematic glamour within the confines of modern luxury transport at twilight hours when soft directional backlighting enhances contours without harshness, emphasizing every subtle curve of her slender frame draped casually yet deliberately across the seat cushion beside a fur-lined garment resting nearby, conveying quiet sophistication mixed with casual allure amidst atmospheric haze tinged with indigo dusk hues casting gentle gradients over exposed skin texture free of freckles or blemishes, maintaining full fidelity to original composition including precise positioning relative to window frames, steering wheel edges, console buttons, and ambient reflections ensuring photorealistic accuracy rendered in ultra-high-definition detail showcasing fine fabric weave patterns beneath tight sleeves, crisp stitching lines, matte finish upholstery grain, gleaming metallic hardware fixtures, and dynamic interplay between artificial cabin lighting sources producing rich tonal contrasts throughout foreground subjects versus dimming backdrop establishing immersive presence akin to premium lifestyle photography shot during late evening commute moments imbued with sensual elegance grounded firmly in authentic human proportionality preserved intact per user directives despite mandated wardrobe substitution requirements.

nodes.title: Qwen3 VL Master Prompts
widgets_values:
--------------------------
IMAGE PROMPT
--------------------------

NSTRUCTION FOR QWEN3-VL:

You will receive two inputs:
1) USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
2) An image

Your task:
Generate a single, long, highly detailed Z-Image prompt.

Rules:

•⁠  ⁠All values in USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in the image. 
•⁠  If USER_CONSTRAINTS = "retain" you follow exactly the image!
•⁠  ⁠If USER_CONSTRAINTS does not specify a value for any of the following attributes: description, environment, outfit, pose, expression, lighting, textures, skin tone, setting, background, atmosphere, realism, lens, camera angle, mood, use the image as the source and follow this perfectly.
•⁠  ⁠Do not contradict USER_CONSTRAINTS.
•⁠  ⁠If the "style" value in USER_CONSTRAINTS is set, apply it as the global style.
•⁠  ⁠Output only the final Z-Image prompt as pure text (no lists, no sections, no code block).

Your Z-Image prompt must be extremely detailed and describe:
•⁠  ⁠the character (face, body shape, skin, details, imperfections)
•⁠  ⁠the character hair style and hair color
•⁠  ⁠clothing and materials
•⁠  ⁠background, environment, objects
•⁠  ⁠mood, ambiance, lighting, shadows
•⁠  ⁠camera angle, lens, depth of field, framing
•⁠  ⁠color palette, atmosphere, realism level
•⁠  ⁠textures and micro-details
•⁠  ⁠overall narrative vibe of the scene

Final instruction:
Combine the constraints from USER_CONSTRAINTS with the visual analysis into one unified, natural, flowing prompt formatted as a single paragraph.  USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in image.


--------------------------
VIDEO PROMPT
--------------------------

INSTRUCTION FOR QWEN3-VL:
You will receive two inputs:
1) USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
2) A short video clip (analyze every frame, motion, transitions, timing, and expressions)

Your task:
Generate a single, concise Wan 2.2 video prompt (maximum 100 words) suitable for 5-second generation.

Rules:
• All values in USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in the video. If USER_CONSTRAINTS says "follow video" or similar for any attribute, match it exactly from the video.
• For all other attributes (character appearance, clothing, environment, lighting, colors, textures, mood, realism), use the video as the exact source and describe faithfully.
• Do not contradict USER_CONSTRAINTS.
• If "style" is set in USER_CONSTRAINTS, apply it globally.
• Output ONLY the final Wan 2.2 prompt as pure text (no lists, no explanations, no code blocks, no word count).

The Wan 2.2 prompt must be highly detailed yet concise and describe:
• The main subject/character (face, hair, body, skin details, imperfections)
• Clothing, materials, accessories
• Environment, background, objects
• Sequence of actions/motions over ~5 seconds (start pose → key movements → end pose)
• Camera behavior (angle, movement like slow zoom/pan/orbit, framing, depth of field)
• Lighting, shadows, ambiance, color grade
• Mood, expressions, gaze, subtle dynamics (hair sway, blinks, breathing)
• Realism level, textures, micro-details, cinematic tags (e.g., 8k, photorealistic, Arri Alexa, shallow DoF)
• Keep total length ≤ 100 words for optimal Wan 2.2 performance.

Allison. A strikingly beautiful young woman with naturally flawless, fair-toned skin and cascading shoulder-length wavy blonde hair that glows softly under ambient nighttime illumination sits elegantly inside a luxurious dark interior vehicle, her head tilted slightly downward with eyes gently closed or cast toward the side, exuding an air of serene confidence; she wears a form-fitting ribbed white crop neck where a thin gold chain necklace rests just above her collarbone — all elements remain untouched by any censored edits — surrounded by faint city lights visible through tinted windows revealing around peripheral surroundings such as illuminated digital display screens mounted along the passenger-side door panel emitting cool blue tones alongside warm golden highlights reflecting off polished surfaces including glossy car ceiling panels adorned subtly with embedded star-like LED accents overhead, evoking intimate cinematic glamour within the confines of modern luxury transport at twilight hours when soft directional backlighting enhances contours without harshness, emphasizing every subtle curve of her slender frame draped casually yet deliberately across the seat cushion beside a fur-lined garment resting nearby, conveying quiet sophistication mixed with casual allure amidst atmospheric haze tinged with indigo dusk hues casting gentle gradients over exposed skin texture free of freckles or blemishes, maintaining full fidelity to original composition including precise positioning relative to window frames, steering wheel edges, console buttons, and ambient reflections ensuring photorealistic accuracy rendered in ultra-high-definition detail showcasing fine fabric weave patterns beneath tight sleeves, crisp stitching lines, matte finish upholstery grain, gleaming metallic hardware fixtures, and dynamic interplay between artificial cabin lighting sources producing rich tonal contrasts throughout foreground subjects versus dimming backdrop establishing immersive presence akin to premium lifestyle photography shot during late evening commute moments imbued with sensual elegance grounded firmly in authentic human proportionality preserved intact per user directives despite mandated wardrobe substitution requirements.

INSTRUCTION FOR QWEN3-VL:
You will receive two inputs:
1) USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
2) A short video clip (analyze every frame, motion, transitions, timing, and expressions)

Your task:
Generate a single, concise Wan 2.2 video prompt (maximum 100 words) suitable for 5-second generation.

Rules:
• All values in USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in the video. If USER_CONSTRAINTS says "follow video" or similar for any attribute, match it exactly from the video.
• For all other attributes (character appearance, clothing, environment, lighting, colors, textures, mood, realism), use the video as the exact source and describe faithfully.
• Do not contradict USER_CONSTRAINTS.
• If "style" is set in USER_CONSTRAINTS, apply it globally.
• Output ONLY the final Wan 2.2 prompt as pure text (no lists, no explanations, no code blocks, no word count).

The Wan 2.2 prompt must be highly detailed yet concise and describe:
• The main subject/character (face, hair, body, skin details, imperfections)
• Clothing, materials, accessories
• Environment, background, objects
• Sequence of actions/motions over ~5 seconds (start pose → key movements → end pose)
• Camera behavior (angle, movement like slow zoom/pan/orbit, framing, depth of field)
• Lighting, shadows, ambiance, color grade
• Mood, expressions, gaze, subtle dynamics (hair sway, blinks, breathing)
• Realism level, textures, micro-details, cinematic tags (e.g., 8k, photorealistic, Arri Alexa, shallow DoF)
• Keep total length ≤ 100 words for optimal Wan 2.2 performance.

If you receive this error with QwenVL: 

RuntimeError: coroutine raised StopIteration

It's possible your transformers need to be on version 4.57.1.  Here is the script I used in Windows to fix mine.  

Be sure this is the right solution for you before you execute this script!!

D:\ComfyUI-5070ti\python_embeded\python.exe -m pip install transformers==4.57.1

nodes.title: Start here for workflow info:
widgets_values:
# MODELS AND NODES USED IN THIS WORKFLOW  

---

## 🚨 GGUF Files - Pick the size based on your VRAM.  Smaller sizes (~Q4 and below) will work on smaller GPUs, but will sacrifice some quality.  Larger sizes (~Q5 and above) can be used on larger GPUs and will offer slightly better quality.🚨

---

## 🔍 ZIT (GGUF)
### **ZIT GGUF Diffusion Models** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Z-Image-Turbo-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

###  **ZIT Text Encoder - qwen_3_4b.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

###  **ZIT VAE** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/tree/main/split_files/vae)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae` 


#### ❗Important - choose the correct size for your machine.  Smaller GPUs use Q4/Q5, larger GPUs use Q8. 

**I like to create subfolders inside my model folders for management like: `ComfyUI/models/unet/ZIT/<model>` or `ComfyUI/models/text_encoder/ZIT/<model>` 

---

## 🔍 Flux Klein 9B (GGUF)
### **Flux Klein Diffusion Models** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/FLUX.2-klein-9B-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

### **Flux Klein Text Encoder** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-8B-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

### **Flux Klein VAE** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/vae-text-encorder-for-flux-klein-9b/tree/main/split_files/vae)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

#### ❗Important - choose the correct size for your machine.  Smaller GPUs use Q4/Q5, larger GPUs use Q8.

**I like to create subfolders inside my model folders for management like: `ComfyUI/models/unet/Flux/Klein/<model>` or `ComfyUI/models/text_encoder/Flux/Klein/<model>` 

---

## 🔍 Qwen-Image (GGUF)
### **Qwen-Image Diffusion Models** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/QuantStack/Qwen-Image-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

### **Qwen-Image Text Encoder** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

### **Qwen-Image VAE** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/vae)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae` 

#### ❗Important - choose the correct size for your machine.  Smaller GPUs use Q4/Q5, larger GPUs use Q8.

**I like to create subfolders inside my model folders for management like: `ComfyUI/models/unet/Qwen-Image/<model>` or `ComfyUI/models/text_encoder/Qwen-Image/<model>` 

---

## 🔍 ZIB (GGUF)
### **ZIB GGUF Diffusion Models** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Z-Image-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

###  **ZIB Text Encoder - qwen_3_4b.safetensors - NOTE THIS IS THE SAME AS Z-IMAGE-TURBO** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

###  **ZIB VAE** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image/tree/main/split_files/vae)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

###  **ZIB 8 Steps Fun LoRA** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/alibaba-pai/Z-Image-Fun-Lora-Distill/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras` 

#### ❗Important - choose the correct size for your machine.  Smaller GPUs use Q4/Q5, larger GPUs use Q8.


**I like to create subfolders inside my model folders for management like: `ComfyUI/models/unet/ZIB/<model>` or `ComfyUI/models/text_encoder/Qwen-Image/<model>` NOTE: THIS IS THE SAME AS Z-IMAGE-TURBO - YOU ONLY NEED ONE INSTANCE OF IT

---

## 🔍 WAN 2.2 I2V (GGUF)
### **WAN 2.2 I2V Diffusion Models (High and Low)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/QuantStack/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

### **WAN 2.2 Text Encoder** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/city96/umt5-xxl-encoder-gguf/tree/db97465c7a8802499269bbeba8e001281a206d35)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

### **WAN 2.1 VAE (Wan 2.2 uses WAN 2.1 VAE)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/QuantStack/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae` 

### **WAN 2.2 LORAs (Get the high and low)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Wan2.2-Lightning/tree/main/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B-4steps-lora-rank64-Seko-V1)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras` 


#### ❗Important - choose the correct size for your machine.  Smaller GPUs use Q4/Q5, larger GPUs use Q8.

**I like to create subfolders inside my model folders for management like: `ComfyUI/models/unet/WAN/WAN2.2/<model>` or `ComfyUI/models/text_encoder/WAN/WAN2.2/<model>` 

---

nodes.title: IMPORTANT
widgets_values:
## On lower VRAM machines, I recommend the:
**ema_7b_sharp-Q4_K_M.gguf**

# 👇👇👇

nodes.title: IMPORTANT
widgets_values:
## On lower RAM (not just VRAM) machines, I recommend a max of 2K upscale 

# 👈👈👈

nodes.title: IMPORTANT
widgets_values:
## Guys - Just understand that video upscale requires a lot of VRAM and RAM.  It may not work on lower VRAM/RAM machines.
